hero.title: Resume Builder
hero.description: Build ATS-safe resumes with clean templates, focused sections, and a smooth print-ready workflow.
hero.note: Fast edits. Clean exports. No clutter.

differences.title: Why Resume Builder
differences.description: Everything you need to ship a polished resume without busywork.

items.title: Live preview
items.description: See changes quickly before printing or exporting your final resume.

items.title: Multiple resumes per user
items.description: Create role-specific versions without duplicating effort.

items.title: Section-based editor
items.description: Focus on one resume section at a time with a calm editing flow.

items.title: ATS-friendly output
items.description: Use clean structure that reads well across screening systems.

items.title: Clean templates
items.description: Choose polished layouts tuned for clarity and print quality.

items.title: Fast editing workflow
items.description: Save, preview, and adjust without leaving the editor.

feel.title: Focused resume creation
feel.description: A calm workflow that helps users move from blank page to finished resume.

items.title: Start with structure
items.description: Pick a template and begin with a clean resume framework.

items.title: Edit section by section
items.description: Add profile, experience, education, skills, and projects without distraction.

items.title: Preview before export
items.description: Check the final layout before printing or downloading.

audiences.title: Who uses Resume Builder
audiences.description: Useful for students, professionals, and job seekers who need polished resumes quickly.

items.title: Students
items.description: Create a clean first resume for internships, placements, and entry-level roles.

items.title: Job seekers
items.description: Build tailored resumes for different job applications.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Maintain updated role-specific resumes for career growth.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Prepare professional profiles for clients, proposals, and portfolios.

resourceSection.title: Works with your career stack
resourceSection.description: Resume Builder fits naturally with other Ansiversa career tools.

items.title: Turn resume context into tailored letters.
items.description: Use your profile and role details to prepare focused cover letters.

items.title: Convert resume highlights into a stronger profile.
items.description: Keep your resume and LinkedIn presence aligned.

items.title: Showcase projects beyond the resume.
items.description: Pair your resume with a polished project portfolio.

groupedSection.title: Templates
groupedSection.description: Four clean layouts that balance structure and clarity.

items.name: Classic
items.description: Traditional layout with strong hierarchy for timeless roles.

items.name: Modern
items.description: Clean blocks and bold headings for contemporary positions.

items.name: Minimal
items.description: Crisp, compact design that keeps focus on essentials.

items.name: Timeline
items.description: Chronological layout that highlights career progression.

technicalSection.title: Built like a system
technicalSection.description: Resume Builder follows the same reusable platform standards as every Ansiversa mini app.
items: Reusable overview contract powered by API metadata.
Resume data designed around projects, sections, and section items.
Clean print-ready workflow for consistent export output.

finalCta.title: Ready to build your resume?
finalCta.description: Start a new resume and get to a printable draft in minutes.
